title: Perspective vs Orthographic camera projection comparison — same scene, same camera position
capture_instructions: Composite image. Left half: Perspective projection active, Queens Campus scene at a 30-degree oblique angle — parallel road edges should converge toward a vanishing point, buildings should show foreshortening. Right half: identical camera position, Orthographic projection active — road edges should appear parallel, no foreshortening. RGB color mode on both. The projection toggle in the Settings panel sidebar should be visible in both halves.
ui_state: Left: Camera Projection = Perspective. Right: Camera Projection = Orthographic. RGB color mode, oblique camera angle, same position both sides.

annotations.label: Perspective projection — converging lines, natural depth
Orthographic projection — parallel lines, consistent scale
Road edges converge to vanishing point (Perspective)
